verdict: FOREO Luna 4 is a premium cleansing brush using sonic technology to remove impurities without harsh abrasion; the 6200 reviews (4.4★) reflect market-leading performance. Excellent foundation for skincare ingredient penetration.

_research.name: FOREO Luna 4 Facial Cleansing Brush
pros: Multiple intensity settings for skin types
_research.con: Premium price for a cleansing tool; doesn't actively treat skin beyond removing barriers.
